description: Configures SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and email tracking records for authenticated email sending via Coreware. Coreware is a multi-tenant platform where each tenant operates on a dedicated sending domain. This template applies the exact DNS records required for that tenant's domain to pass email authentication checks.
variableDescription: spfRules: SPF mechanisms for the sending provider, excluding the v=spf1 prefix and all qualifier (e.g. include:mailgun.org). dkimSelector: DKIM selector label assigned by the sending provider (e.g. mailo). dkimRecord: Full DKIM public key TXT value provided by the sending provider. trackingTarget: FQDN that the email tracking CNAME on the 'email' subdomain points to.
